# WakilBhai

> Legal documentation service and lawyer connect for India — "Legal Work. Without Tension." Free, plain-language guides to common legal problems, ready-to-use document formats, and advocate help on WhatsApp. WakilBhai is a documentation service with advocate partners, not a law firm; nothing here is legal advice.

## How it works (the funnel)

- **Free guides & tools** — step-by-step help for everyday legal problems (cheque bounce, rent, salary, consumer complaints), with real deadlines and costs.
- **Free WhatsApp lawyer** — a 10-minute consult on WhatsApp: https://wa.me/917686022245
- **Documents from ₹199** — notices, agreements and affidavits drafted and delivered in 1–3 working days (₹199–₹999).
- **Advocate consult / case handling** — paid advocate help for complex matters.

Content is available in English, Hindi, Bengali, Urdu, Marathi, Telugu, Tamil and Gujarati. English lives at the root; other locales use a `/{locale}/` prefix (e.g. `/hi/...`). Guides are fully translated in English, Hindi, Bengali and Urdu; Marathi, Telugu, Tamil and Gujarati are rolling out.

## Best guides

- [Cheque bounced? What to do](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/money-recovery/cheque-bounce-what-to-do): The Section 138 process — send a demand notice within 30 days of the bank's return memo, the issuer gets 15 days to pay, then a criminal complaint within 30 days.
- [Unpaid salary — what to do](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/job-salary/unpaid-salary-what-to-do): Recovering unpaid salary or full-and-final dues — demand letter, labour authorities, and the legal routes for different kinds of employees.
- [Security deposit not returned](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/security-deposit-not-returned): What to do when a landlord won't return your deposit after you vacate — demand letter, timelines, and small-cause/consumer options.
- [How to make a rent agreement](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/rent-agreement-guide): Writing the terms, stamp paper and registration, and why the 11-month format is standard — with the costs involved.
- [Consumer forum complaint guide](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/consumer-complaints/consumer-forum-complaint-guide): Filing a consumer complaint — written complaint/legal notice first, then e-Daakhil, the forum tiers, and the compensation you can claim.
- [Money gone in UPI fraud](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/cyber-fraud/upi-fraud-money-recovery): Act in 24 hours — the 1930 helpline freeze, cybercrime.gov.in, and RBI's zero-liability windows (3 working days) for unauthorised transactions.
- [Scammed online — where to complain](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/cyber-fraud/online-scam-complaint): Fake shopping, job and investment frauds — cybercrime portal, chargebacks, and the parallel consumer route.
- [Sextortion or online blackmail](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/cyber-fraud/sextortion-blackmail): Do not pay — evidence preservation, anonymous reporting on cybercrime.gov.in, takedowns and the 1930 freeze.
- [Loan app harassment](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/cyber-fraud/fake-loan-app-harassment): RBI digital-lending rules, Sachet and Ombudsman complaints, and stopping morphed-photo extortion.
- [How to file an FIR](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/police-criminal/how-to-file-fir): Station, online e-FIR and the Zero FIR rule — what the FIR must contain and your right to a free copy.
- [Police not filing your FIR](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/police-criminal/police-not-filing-fir): The escalation ladder — SP complaint, then the Magistrate under Section 156(3) CrPC (now 175(3) BNSS).
- [Anticipatory bail explained](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/police-criminal/anticipatory-bail-basics): Pre-arrest protection under Section 438 CrPC (now 482 BNSS) — process, conditions and realistic costs.
- [Received a court summons](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/police-criminal/received-court-summons): Verify on eCourts, never ignore it — warrants and Section 174A IPC (now 209 BNS) follow silence.
- [Traffic challan — pay or contest](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/police-criminal/traffic-challan-disputes): Check free on echallan.parivahan.gov.in, Virtual Courts, and the quarterly Lok Adalat settlements.
- [Mutual divorce: process and cost](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/family-personal/mutual-divorce-process-cost): Two motions, the 6-month cooling period and when courts waive it, with realistic fee ranges.
- [Maintenance for wife and children](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/family-personal/maintenance-wife-children): Section 125 CrPC (now BNSS 144) — who can claim, interim maintenance, and enforcement.
- [How to make a will](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/family-personal/how-to-make-a-will): Two witnesses, no stamp paper, registration optional — the validity rules that prevent family litigation.
- [Name change process](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/family-personal/name-change-process): Affidavit, newspaper ads and the Gazette — ₹2,000–3,500 all-in over 4–8 weeks.
- [Succession certificate vs legal heir certificate](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/family-personal/succession-certificate-legal-heir): Which document unlocks which asset when someone dies without a will.
- [Friend not returning money](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/money-recovery/friend-not-returning-money): Legal notice, summary suit under Order 37 CPC, and the free Lok Adalat settlement lane.
- [Recovery agent harassment](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/money-recovery/loan-recovery-agent-harassment): RBI Fair Practices Code limits and the free RBI Ombudsman escalation.
- [Builder delaying possession — RERA](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/builder-delay-rera-complaint): Monthly delay interest or refund under Section 18 RERA, filed online on your state portal.
- [Property registration process](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/property-registration-process): Title check, sale deed, state-wise stamp duty and the sub-registrar steps.
- [Illegal possession and eviction](https://www.wakilbhai.com/help/property-tenancy/illegal-possession-eviction): Lawful eviction routes for owners — and why self-help eviction backfires.

## Free document templates

- [Cheque bounce demand notice (Sec 138)](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/cheque-bounce-demand-notice)
- [Unpaid salary demand letter](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/unpaid-salary-demand-letter)
- [Security deposit demand letter](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/security-deposit-demand-letter)
- [11-month rent agreement format](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/rent-agreement-11-month)
- [Consumer complaint letter to seller](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/consumer-complaint-letter)
- [Personal loan repayment demand letter](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/loan-repayment-demand-letter)
- [RTI application format](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/rti-application-format)
- [General affidavit format](https://www.wakilbhai.com/templates/general-affidavit-format)

## Free tools

- [Cheque bounce deadline calculator](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/cheque-bounce-calculator): Every Section 138 deadline from the day your cheque bounced — demand notice, 15-day payment window and complaint dates.
- [Limitation period checker](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/limitation-period-checker): How long you have to take a matter to court and the day the clock starts, from the Limitation Act, 1963 schedule.
- [Notice period calculator](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/notice-period-calculator): Your last working day from the date resignation or notice was served.
- [Rent agreement cost estimator](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/rent-agreement-cost): Stamp duty plus registration cost of a rent agreement, state by state.
- [Stamp duty calculator](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/stamp-duty-calculator): Stamp duty on a rent agreement, sale deed or gift deed, state by state.
- [Gratuity calculator](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/gratuity-calculator): The gratuity your employer owes under the Payment of Gratuity Act.
- [Maintenance estimator](https://www.wakilbhai.com/tools/maintenance-estimator): A broad educational range for spousal and child maintenance (courts decide case-by-case).
